description_long: This is a medium-sized, single-story hostel building with a prominent red gabled roof and light blue exterior walls. The front facade features a central wooden door with a small red canopy above it, flanked by three large rectangular windows on each side, all with white decorative trim. The building sits on a paved lot, with a side extension and a secondary entrance visible on one side, accessible by a short set of steps. The rear of the building is plain, with no windows and visible roof trusses under the eaves. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from masonry or concrete, with wooden and metal elements for doors and window frames. The overall design is simple and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on practicality.
description: A single-story hostel with a red gabled roof, blue walls, and a symmetrical front featuring a central door and large windows. The building has a side extension and sits on a paved lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a red canopy, central wooden door, and six large windows with white trim.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain blue wall, a small side extension with a window, and a secondary entrance with steps.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the side extension, a single window, and a secondary entrance with steps.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain blue wall with no windows and exposed roof trusses under the eaves.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is centrally located on the front facade, featuring a single wooden door with a rectangular shape and a small red gabled canopy above. The entrance is accessed directly from the paved area, with no visible steps or ramp at the main door. The canopy is supported by simple brackets and provides a modest decorative accent.
attribute_window_arrangement: The front facade has six large rectangular windows, three on each side of the main door, all with white decorative trim. The side extension has one window, and there are no windows on the rear facade. The windows are symmetrically arranged and evenly spaced, contributing to a balanced appearance.
attribute_architectural_style: The building exhibits a utilitarian style with some neoclassical influences, as seen in the symmetrical window arrangement and decorative window trim, but overall remains simple and functional.
